sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Getafe are in poor form, having lost all of their last 5 matches without scoring in 4 of them. Athletic Club, on the other hand, have a mixed record with 2 wins, 1 draw, and 2 losses in their last 5, showing better consistency and defensive stability.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last two head-to-head matches, the results have been close with a 1-1 draw and a 0-2 win for Athletic Club. Matches between these teams often result in low-scoring games, with under 2.5 goals in 5 of the last 7 encounters.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Athletic Club rank 4th with 51 goals scored and a strong defensive record, conceding only 26 goals. Getafe, positioned 15th, struggle offensively with just 31 goals and have a weaker possession game, ranking 19th in average ball possession.

sections.subtitle: Key Player Impact
sections.text: Athletic Club's Oihan Sancet (15 goals) poses a significant threat, while Getafe's Mauro Arambarri (9 goals) will be crucial for any hope of a positive result. Missing key players like Iñaki and Nico Williams for Athletic Club might slightly hamper their attack.

sections.subtitle: Match Context and Tactics
sections.text: Getafe's high foul rate (2nd in the league) and Athletic Club's ability to score late (high percentage of goals after the 60th minute) suggest a physical game where Athletic might capitalize on defensive errors. Getafe's home struggles could play into Athletic's hands.
